properties.name: app.jwt.secret
properties.description: Base64-encoded secret used to sign JWT tokens.

properties.name: app.frontend.url
properties.description: Frontend application base URL used for redirects.

properties.name: app.bootstrap.admin.enabled
properties.description: Whether to create a default approved admin user when no admin exists.

properties.name: app.bootstrap.admin.name
properties.description: Display name for the bootstrapped admin user.

properties.name: app.bootstrap.admin.email
properties.description: Email address for the bootstrapped admin user.

properties.name: app.bootstrap.admin.password
properties.description: Password for the bootstrapped admin user.
